---
name: Question
about: Ask a question about using EDOT Flow Visualizer
title: '[QUESTION] '
labels: question
assignees: ''
---

## Your Question

Ask your question here. Be as specific as possible.

## What I'm Trying to Do

Describe what you're trying to accomplish or understand.

**Example**: "I want to create a topology that [...]" or "I'm trying to understand how [...]"

## What I've Tried

What have you already tried? Include:
- Documentation you've read
- Experiments you've run
- Search queries you've used

## Context

Any additional context that might help answer your question:
- What scenario are you working with?
- What's your use case?
- What's your experience level with OpenTelemetry/EDOT?

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your question.

## Environment (if relevant)

- OS: [e.g., macOS, Windows, Linux]
- Browser: [e.g., Chrome, Firefox, Safari]
- EDOT Flow Visualizer Version: [e.g., v0.1.0]

---

**Before asking:**
- [ ] I have checked the [User Guide](../docs/user-guide.md)
- [ ] I have checked the [FAQ in README](../README.md#faq)
- [ ] I have searched existing issues and discussions
- [ ] I have tried the relevant preset scenarios

**Tip**: For general discussions or brainstorming, consider using [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/your-org/edot-flow-visualizer/discussions) instead of opening an issue.
